breakdown: The answer provides accurate factual content comparing CoT and ToT with good coverage and structure. However, there are gaps: Chinese characters '显著' appear erroneously in the text, evidence citations lack explicit inference chains, and the 'Quick-pick guide' section appears truncated. The actionability dimension is weakened by the incomplete guidance section. There is also a discrepancy in the rubric - the weighting formula lists different dimensions (naming/error_handling/type_safety/architecture/test_coverage/documentation) than the evaluation criteria (Factual Accuracy/Coverage/Insight/Evidence/Actionability/Structure). This scoring applies the content-relevant dimensions to match the question intent.
